headline: Did GE Vernova’s (GEV) AI Data Center Orders and Capital Returns Just Redefine Its Narrative?
summary: GE Vernova recently reported that in 2025 it signed over US$2.00 billion of data center electrification orders, around triple the prior year, while also outlining higher dividends, a larger share repurchase program, and upgraded multi-year guidance. Alongside these orders, GE Vernova’s role in powering AI-related infrastructure was underscored by industry estimates of very large AI electrification investment needs by 2030 and progress on advanced nuclear fuel supply for experimental data...
